review_title: Built my Personal Website in a day
description: The best option I've found so far for building a low cost, good looking website. See mine at vincent-turner.com for an example
author: Vincent T.
pros: The templates enabled me to build exactly what I wanted in literally 1 day with no technical knowledge
cons: Small glitch in using transparent images so a heads up on that would have been useful
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with Webnode is very good. I find it easy to use and it mostly covers my needs. I have had to use some third party integrations to be able to get all the features I want. Although, the latest updates have been good (like being able to add social media icons directly in Webnode, having my contact information right at the top of the page and more options to customise the header).
author: Katja B.
pros: It's easy to use and very intuitive. I like that you basically see the end result while you are building the website.
cons: The filing system of your downloaded pictures is non-existent. It's hard to reuse (because it's almost impossible to find them) the same picture when you have downloaded a lot of them. The customisation of your website according to your own brand is very restricted (you are not able to use your own fonts and colours).

review_title: Too Expensive for Such Limited Capabilities
description: Webnode's web builder is extremely limited in what it can do in comparison to Weebly by Square and Wix professional plans which all run about $350/year. I have websites on all three of these platforms, and Webnode is the most limited. You can't change fonts, there are only a handful of text colors, You can't limit white space on the page because every section has a border around it. If someone's a site member, they have access to all pages instead of being able to select access for each users. The shipping setup is the WORST. If you want to provide FREE shipping for some products, it's an option that anyone can select for any product which means you either eat the shipping cost, cancel the order or seem like a jerk going to your clients to request they pay for shipping. They don't have any apps or plugins available to increase website functionality. I'm already moving my Weebly pages to Wix, and if it wasn't such a hassle to move sites I would NOT have renewed with Webnode in September 2022.
author: Zari B.
pros: I like that Webnode offers email accounts with a professional package, so there's no need to purchase another service for branded email. I also appreciate that they increased storage for my plan.
cons: Webnode's web builder is extremely limited in what it can do in comparison to Weebly by Square and Wix professional plans. I have websites on all three of these platforms, and Webnode is the most limited. Doesn't always load or allow you to edit on browsers other than Chrome.

description: Creating, designing and hosting websites in one central location is the crucial benefit that I gain with this tool.
author: Anuoluwapo B.
pros: I started using Webnode in 2022 when I was third year in campus. How I am able to create and design websites without coding is what I like most about Webnode.
cons: Kudos to the vendor that they offer tons of free and advanced CSS templates now, this was an issue I was facing when I was a new user.

review_title: Great tool for startups with no programmers
description: Overall great for small businesses. Haven't found anything better yet.
author: Ivana L.
pros: Building a website with this software is as easy as creating a powerpoint presentation. No need to know any programming language, no need to write something in one place and then checking in another place how it actually will look. Adjusting the website directly "within the website" is just perfect.
cons: As the online world grows, we like to have more and more features and we like to automate our work as much as possible. Therefore, there is always possibility to make something better. For example, adding automatic invoice issuing after somebody buys from your eshop (maybe it is already there), adding possibility of Filtering products in eshop would be nice features.

review_title: Good, like it but it can get it better!
description: Good enough for what he has to do, enough. But it can be much better!
author: Tudosie A.
pros: Simplicity, easy of use, the table of content is interactive!
cons: Sometimes it's annoying that it's ... too simplistic. The title of a newly written article doesn't shrink, sometimes it's too big, it just doesn't work. It looks unsightly. If there was a "dark mode" function always active for articles it would be fantastic. The format of the personal blog is intended to be dark, gray or black. Every time I write a new article, I have to manually set the background from white to black, not having a native "dark mode" function. More templates available such in as WIX haves. Greater openness to more diversity in choosing the layers and templates used on the site.

description: One of the best tools for small and middle sized companies and for artists.
author: José M.
pros: Esay to use even for persons not familiar in building Web pages. Many features and good SEO. All in all my best investment to make my services public and known worldwide.
cons: By using different languages you have to create everything new.

author: Michele M.
pros: I use Webnode as Wix alternative to create and design websites. I like that it offers a wide array of free CSS templates that makes it easy and straightforward to design stunning and highly responsive websites.
cons: Unfortunately, Webnode lack robust features and some products such as domain registration are highly priced.

review_title: Been using service for a few years now and am happy.
description: Overall I am very happy with Webnode. It was easy to use and less expensive than other options I looked into.
author: Melissa K.
pros: I used Webnode to build my website for my basket business. I wanted to have a page to promote myself and bring credability to my business but didn't want it to be too complicated or expensive. The template was very easy to use and the finished product looks good on both computer and mobile. I have kept the website running for a couple years now and am very happy.
cons: I pay for the yearly service but there is still a watermark at the bottom that says make a Webnode website for free. I understand having that on the free service but I wish it didn't show up on mine. I feel it gives the impression I didn't pay for my website. It isn't a huge deal as it is off to the side and not distracting, but that would be my only critique.

description: Positive, good website creator for new or small businesses. Worth using it if you are in one of these.
author: Edmond S.
pros: Easy to start and adjust. Everyone can start their own website with Webnode. I contacted the customer support, and they were open to answering and considering my e-mail.
cons: Limitations of available features in the free version. New users can feel stressed when they cannot tell whether it is their limit or Webnode's limit.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall it was easy to use and easy to maintain.
author: Mel Elizabeth K.
pros: Webnode was the cheapest option I was able to find when setting up my website.
cons: I wish they would take the footnote off that says "make a website for free." It makes it look like mine was free and it was not.

description: Overall my experience with webnode has left me with medium satisfaction. We just renewed our second year but we discussed possibly switching because as a very small business we do not want to have to pay more for variants and sizes. Also would love the ability to add shipping cost to each item rather than having to create my own key through the cost by weight option.. although I see that could be helpful to many it kind of worked against what I was trying to do. As of the rest of the site and user friendliness it is easy to use.
author: Maggie F.
pros: I like that it is simple to use and the editing keys are mostly easy to find.
cons: I do not like that I must pay more for things like sizes and variants.

review_title: Beautiful Results - Fast and Easy to Setup for Beginners
description: Very good. Honestly, I am happy with Webnode and always look forward to using it. I asked for a special discount on one of my Webnode websites (during the pandemic) and I got an offer from the customer service which I took, which I appreciate. I hope Webnode will continue this quality of customer service and continuously improve the product. Perhaps if there is any other suggestion, it would be wonderful if there are some sort of newsletter or feature updates emailed to current customers. I would love to see that Webnode team think of ways to improve the current already ok product. I know Webnode has a facebook page but I also know it isn't that active. So, some kind of updates or new features notifications to existing customers will be wonderful.
author: Zairil Z.
pros: It is easy to use and compare to others, this one is rather intuitive. Above all, I can check the final results on my webpage appearance immediately. I can change and improve in real time until I like what I see. For readers, the availability of the latest information for them to read (in a clean and easy way) are much appreciated. For me, I look forward all the time to add new features and information on my site.
cons: Font choices. I wish there are more choices of fonts I can choose. Apart from fonts, videos that can be included in the website must be from YouTube. Which means, even a small short video must be uploaded to YouTube first. Although I appreciate uploading videos to the limited 'quota' is probably not the best idea, sometimes a small video file is not worth uploading to YouTube first too.

review_title: Great, professional, easy to use software!
description: Webnode has been a great add on to my business allowing me to reach potential customers. I look forward to keeping my website managed by webnode for the foreseeable future!
author: Dylan H.
pros: Love the array of templates. The software is simple, easy to use and suitable for anyone. The website is easy to edit by simply dragging and dropping. Have received numerous complements about the design of my website!
cons: Only adjustments are: - Be able to edit form font - Be able to edit font without changing the whole website font - Be able to change font colour on the header and buttons

author: Adina Veronica G.
pros: Webnode has been amazing for my teaching career. I needed to create a blog, which would be attractive, to systematize my work as a teacher. I like that I managed to put in different competitions, extracurricular activities, prizes, everything I did with my students.
cons: I really have nothing to complain about. It helps a lot in my job as a teacher from advertising to design

description: Good, does most of what i need.
author: Rune L.
pros: Its working, has alot of templates, and is easy to use and quick to edit. Good customer service.
cons: Should be customizable beyond the template chosen. Seo is not prioritized. Cannot have its own videos, only links to youtube etc. Not possible to choose size/quality of images shown. Does not have the option for digital downloads from webshop, like photographs etc.

review_title: Fashionable way to build an outstanding website in the shortest time.
description: It is an easy way out to website needs. Webnode stands in for expensive designers. It saves me alot since I only consult when necessary.
author: Hussein D.
pros: With the current trends in technology, it is fashionable to have a tool that will assist in building a good name online. I made a bold step towards website revelation. I have been able to build catchy deals online with little knowledge. The best part is it is free.
cons: No cons. Webnode is free. It is user friendly and does not require much knowledge on website building.

review_title: One of the Best For Free or low cost website.
description: Overall, I am very happy with Webnode this is a small business so free service is enough but when i have my big business I will stick with them With premium service.
author: Robin S.
pros: Webnode has plenty of storage for small businesses in free service with a small ad at the bottom of the page, unlike other similar services. Software is very easy and self explained to use.
cons: To be honest, I thought about what I don't like and I can't come up with 1 complaint.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: No nonsense. Works fine to the extent that one forgets, that you even have it....
author: Harald M.
pros: Facilitates usage of multilingual websites. (Currently Estonian, English, French, Swedish and German). This feature is really unique! Usually one only constructs an English site (because all other languages tend to be unsupported up to -in the case of Microsoft- antisupported). Here things work so well that we felt encouraged and currently plan a Hebrew version to be launched 2023.
cons: Email GUI: Search functions are lousy: email address search requires literal coincidence. No content search available (or at least we could not make it run).

description: Overall, I highly recommend Webnode for people looking to create a website quickly and easily. It's an excellent choice for beginners and small businesses looking to have a professional online presence without investing a lot of time or money.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: What I liked most about Webnode is the ease with which one can create a professional website. The platform offers a wide variety of design templates, styles, and colors, which allows you to customize your website according to your needs and brand image. Additionally, the website creation process is very intuitive and easy to use, even for beginners.
cons: Regarding the negative aspects, I encountered some difficulties with customizing certain elements of my website. Sometimes it was hard to find the desired customization option or there were no customization options for certain elements. However, Webnode's customer service was always available to help me solve my problems.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: All in all, building a website was quite easy and fast to do. Prices seem competitive.
author: Mieke K.
pros: Webnode is wonderful, yet in the same breath also slightly disappointing. Most of the time I’ve been impressed with Webnode as a whole as it has unique and advanced functionalities. Webnode has some cool features that you won't easily find with other website making brands, including advanced features like help with SEO and the ability to set up your website in multiple languages. The drag and dop functionality is very user-friendly.
cons: But there are also limitations to customisations and the experience while building the site is generally quite old-fashioned [e.g. custom colours for instance].

review_title: Easy to use and professional looking.
description: I am able to get more business through webnode due to a certain demographic not having social media
author: Briana S.
pros: The ease of use is astounding. Anyone could use this software and have a professional, polished websight.
cons: When I email an incoming client back they don't seem to get my email???

description: My overall experience with Webnode is positive. Through my website, I can better present myself, or my products and services that the client receives.
author: Michaela H.
pros: Yes, the simple operation of the product and its implementation in my business simply raised it to a higher level and that was the point.
cons: due to the varied offer of forms, I myself can creatively create an idea of the best presentation of my services and products.

description: Great place to make website for small businesses
author: Juliana Y.
pros: Easy to use and manage. Good price and good service.
cons: Website tamples, could be more creative options

description: Overall the experience is good.
author: Mark G.
pros: Webnode is was to use. It allows uploading of PDF files that certain other online website builders do not allow. Also, Webnode allows fast editing.
cons: I created a few websites on Webnode for a non-profit organisation and some of those websites have been deleted without warning. There is an issue with security. You need two-step verification. You cannot select the URL of your website. Also, you cannot change the page name easily. You have to delete the page.
